article.title: Uber | L4 | Bengaluru | Accepted
article.content:
College: Tier 1
Education: BTech( ECE )
Years of Experience: ~3
Company: Uber
Title/Level: L4 (SDE-2)
Location: Banglore, India
Prev Comp: 34 LPA
Base Salary: 4,000,000 (excluding PF)
Signing Bonus: 0
RSU: 50,500 USD (25% each year vesting)
Vesting Period: 4 years
Variable: 705,000 
Total comp 1st year (Base + Bonus + Stock): 57.9L
Benefits: Standard uber benefits

Interview exp - https://leetcode.com/discuss/post/6770968/uber-l4-bangalore-offer-by-10399vk-c73t/

post.content: Nice OP! \nCan you let me know what was your HLD Question and what was your approach?
Congrats OP. Do you have a competing offer ?
Atleast get a competing offer in the meantime, so when they have an open position and they reach out again. You can negotiate and also they won\'t be able to lowball you for a lesser compensation.
